title: moraea modesta
intro: Moraea modesta, also known as the red milkwort, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Moraea modesta include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. Moraea modesta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
